title: How to setup and use Claude Code for FREE  (Step-by-Step Guide)
summary: A tutorial demonstrating how to set up and use Claude Code with Ollama to build agentic AI applications locally without paid APIs. The guide covers installation, LLM selection (e.g., Qwen 3.5), and building a complete travel agency AI app with Python and Flask UI.
